title: FL CastMember - LAVAGANG
body:
[REDACTED]: Let's do this. Instead of throwing out the extra FantasyLand data as garbage, we’ll start smuggling it out and build our own FantasyLand. We can use this space to test and create our ideas outside the control of MythOS and Monogon!

We’ll slowly gather members and eventually house an army of creators all building a fantastic wild simulated future!

First Rule of Lavagang: Talk about Lavagang!
